title: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies and your opinions on them
display_title: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies and your opinions on them
wikitext:
[]: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Wed Sep 27, 2017 8:49 am Being a rather visual person, one of the first things I key in on when watching any of the iterations of Evangelion is the overall designs of the various Eva units from that series/movie. In every media from NGE to EoE to 1.0 to 2.0 to 3.0 (and probably again in 3.0+1.0/4.0) the general proportions and designs of the Evas has changed either subtly or completely from iteration to iteration. So... this thread/discussion is simply meant to call out the physical differences and changes (and similarities) between the various versions of the Eva units and to give people a chance to say which they may prefer over another. With that, here's some analysis via images. I've tried to stick to official art as much as possible for the clearest comparisons and have included a few figure images in addition. So lets start with Neon Genesis Evangelion SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Sep 27, 2017 9:07 am ArvisTaljik wrote: Now we come to Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0/1.1/1.11 You are (not) alone In 1.0, we have a return to close to the original proportions of the Eva units seen in NGE. Broader shoulders, thinner waist, and we get some cool new color apps to boot. Unit 00 looks less like a traffic cone and more like an actual prototype testing unit and Unit 01 gains some green stripes and accents to offset the majority single-shade purple seen in NGE. But the main thing here is that the units look physically much more like NGE than EoE. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Wed Sep 27, 2017 9:31 am DarkBluePhoenix wrote: That last pic is showing up as a mess of text

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Sep 27, 2017 9:58 am That same image is just displaying the word "image" Anyway, I liked your post, and I'd have to say I like the original designs better. They look far more interesting, and it looks more organic than the heavy blockier armor of the rebuilds.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Wed Sep 27, 2017 11:04 am DarkBluePhoenix wrote: That same image is just displaying the word "image" Anyway, I liked your post, and I'd have to say I like the original designs better. They look far more interesting, and it looks more organic than the heavy blockier armor of the rebuilds.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Sep 27, 2017 11:28 am I prefer the original designs for 00 blue version (Never been fond of the orange design) and 01 but I do prefer 02's design in rebuild as I like the more demon like crest and face as I think it fits better but body wise for 02 I prefer the End Of Evangelion design and I do like Mari's pink 08 unit from 3.33.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 28, 2017 6:13 am Mari is the best Eva Unit design. (Still considering that to be somewhat of a possibility.) (...maybe.)

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Thu Sep 28, 2017 7:16 am silvermoonlight wrote: I prefer the original designs for 00 blue version (Never been fond of the orange design) and 01 but I do prefer 02's design in rebuild as I like the more demon like crest and face as I think it fits better but body wise for 02 I prefer the End Of Evangelion design and I do like Mari's pink 08 unit from 3.33.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Thu Sep 28, 2017 7:25 am ArvisTaljik wrote: Considering we're talking about Unit 08 here, do you prefer the α design and proportions that mirror 2.0/2.2/2.22 or do you prefer the β version with the new armor? Unit 08α SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Thu Sep 28, 2017 7:59 am See, the armor on Unit-08β looks like it would severely hamper mobility by having less articulation points. With Unit-08α (and all the other armor of that design) there is a clear amount of flexibility built into those spaces between armor plates that Unit-08β doesn't have, and taking away some of the mobility from the EVA.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 29, 2017 8:06 am @ArvisTaljik , Oh, I'm not referring to Eva 08 in any fashion. I'm referring to Mari herself somehow being an actual Evangelion unit. If that is the case, then I prefer her over pretty much any version of any Eva unit.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Fri Sep 29, 2017 8:35 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: @ArvisTaljik , Oh, I'm not referring to Eva 08 in any fashion. I'm referring to Mari herself somehow being an actual Evangelion unit. If that is the case, then I prefer her over pretty much any version of any Eva unit.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Sep 30, 2017 8:50 am I know, but, just in case... That aside, I do like the interchangeability of Unit 02 ß in general. Also, B-Type equipment (or its nearest NTE counterpart) looks far more elegant in Eva Q than it did in NGE.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Sep 30, 2017 9:22 am ArvisTaljik wrote: So lets start with Neon Genesis Evangelion SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Thu Oct 05, 2017 11:48 am So it seems the most preferred armor and proportions (based on the responses) are those seen in Rebuild 2.0. Honestly, I figured that people might end up preferring the 2.0 looks only because none of the proportions aren't overly exaggerated and their bodies look a bit more "realistic" in overall shape.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by mys_721tx » Sat Nov 25, 2017 1:17 pm Unit 02 and Unit 08 were refitted with new, wider, triangular knee pads like ones on Unit 13. Mark 09 is the only Eva with old style knee pads in 3.0. I wonder if there is an in-universe explanation to that.

[]: Re: Changes in Eva Designs between Series and Movies (and your opinions on them!)             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Nov 25, 2017 8:30 pm mys_721tx wrote: Unit 02 and Unit 08 were refitted with new, wider, triangular knee pads like ones on Unit 13. Mark 09 is the only Eva with old style knee pads in 3.0. I wonder if there is an in-universe explanation to that.
